title: Pteracanthus panduratus
taxonomy: Pteracanthus panduratus is classified under the family Rubiaceae, a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This classification places Pteracanthus panduratus within the order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Apocynaceae, Loganiaceae, and Gentianaceae. Further, Pteracanthus panduratus is placed within the genus Pteracanthus, which is part of the subfamily Ixoroideae. The species is native to tropical regions and is a member of the Angiospermophyta, a large group of flowering plants. The classification of Pteracanthus panduratus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants and its place within the broader botanical hierarchy.
